name: scribd-dl
description: Scribd Document Downloader based on ray.yukawai's script

scripts.build:app: bun --filter @scribd-dl/desktop tauri build && mkdir -p output && cp apps/desktop/src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg output/
scripts.build:app:x64: bun --filter @scribd-dl/desktop tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && mkdir -p output && cp apps/desktop/src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg output/
scripts.build:app:universal: bun --filter @scribd-dl/desktop tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin && mkdir -p output && cp apps/desktop/src-tauri/target/universal-apple-darwin/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg output/
scripts.lint: oxlint packages/engine/*.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix packages/engine/*.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json packages/engine/*.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json packages/engine/*.ts packages/engine/src packages/engine/test packages/shared/src apps/tui/tui.ts apps/tui/src apps/tui/test apps/web/src apps/web/test scripts
